headline: Raytheon’s US$100 Million Radar Expansion Might Change The Case For Investing In RTX (RTX)
summary: Raytheon, an RTX business, recently committed US$100 million to expand its Portsmouth, Rhode Island facility, aiming to accelerate LTAMDS radar testing and increase Patriot GEM-T subcomponent production following earlier investment in its Andover, Massachusetts radar plant. This build-out, layered on fresh multi‑hundred‑million‑dollar SPY‑6 and multi‑billion‑dollar surface‑to‑air missile contracts, reinforces RTX’s growing role in advanced air and missile defense infrastructure for the U.S...

headline: RTX Unit Raytheon’s $100M Investment Gets Investors Talking – Why Is LTAMDS Radar In The Spotlight Today?

headline: RTX invests $100 million to accelerate radar testing and interceptor production in Rhode Island
summary: Raytheon, an RTX (NYSE: RTX) business, is investing $100 million to expand its Portsmouth, R.I., facility. The expansion will accelerate Lower Tier Air and Missile Defense Sensor (LTAMDS) testing by increasing capacity and boost Patriot® GEM-T subcomponent production to meet growing global demand.
